description: Adapt is a B2B lead intelligence database with verified contact data and real-time enrichment, built to help sales and marketing teams target the right accounts.
overview: Adapt gives sales and marketing teams a B2B contact database with real-time enrichment across dozens of attributes, helping them build targeted lists and run account-based prospecting.
what_is: Adapt is a B2B prospecting database that helps teams find and reach their ideal customers. It covers a wide range of tech sectors and high-growth companies, and enriches records with dozens of attributes so account discovery and list building are precise rather than guesswork.

It is most useful for building targeted contact lists, supporting account-based marketing, and enriching existing data for cleaner segmentation. Teams tend to see better email success and faster prospecting once the data is feeding their workflow.

Adapt fits the GTM stack by syncing with CRMs and exporting clean data for outreach. It sits at the top of the funnel as a data and enrichment source rather than an outbound-automation or CRM platform on its own.
